name: gdekod-backend
description: Backend API для сервиса ГдеКод (Node.js + Yandex Cloud Functions + PostgreSQL)

scripts.lint: echo 'lint not configured yet — будет ESLint после первого деплоя' && exit 0
scripts.test: echo 'tests not configured yet — будет Vitest, см. tests/README.md' && exit 0
scripts.deploy-public:merchants: yc serverless function version create --function-name gdekod-public-merchants --runtime nodejs20 --entrypoint src/handlers/public/merchants.handler --memory 128m --execution-timeout 10s --source-path .
scripts.deploy-public:coupons: yc serverless function version create --function-name gdekod-public-coupons --runtime nodejs20 --entrypoint src/handlers/public/coupons.handler --memory 128m --execution-timeout 10s --source-path .
scripts.deploy-public: npm run deploy-public:merchants && npm run deploy-public:coupons
scripts.deploy-private: echo 'private API not implemented yet — см. src/handlers/private/README.md' && exit 0
